# Summary

Brief, plain-language description of what this PR does and why. Avoid
restating the diff line-by-line — focus on the user-visible change or the
architectural choice.

## Linked issues

Closes #
Refs #

## Phase / area

Which part of the bible / phase tracker this slots into. e.g.
"Phase 7 polish — service worker", "Phase 2 — club detail page".

## Changes

- [ ] Bullet-list of notable changes
- [ ] Use Conventional Commits in commit subjects (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)

## Test plan

How you verified this works. Tick what applies:

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:export` succeeds
- [ ] Manually clicked through the affected route at 375 px and ≥ 1024 px
- [ ] Playwright suite passes (`npx playwright test`)
- [ ] Visual regression: include before / after screenshots if UI changed

## Screenshots / video

Mobile and desktop views for any UI change. Drop them inline or link them.

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything you want a second pair of eyes on, trade-offs you considered, or
follow-ups you're deferring.
